g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain how a Go HTTP server handles an incoming client request')
sendPrompt('How does an HTTP handler work in Go? Show me a code example with net/http')
sendPrompt('Explain Go context.Context: timeout, cancellation, and WithTimeout usage in Go')
sendPrompt('What is a goroutine in Go? How does go keyword spawn a goroutine? Compare to Java threads')
sendPrompt('Show a Go fan-out pattern: spawning multiple goroutines concurrently')
sendPrompt('How do goroutines communicate using channels in Go? Give me a medior-level example')
sendPrompt('Explain Go channels: buffered vs unbuffered, make(chan T), send and receive syntax')
sendPrompt('Show me a Go worker pool pattern using goroutines and channels with code example')
sendPrompt('How does a job queue channel work in a Go worker pool? Show buffered channel usage')
sendPrompt('Write a Go worker function that reads from a job channel and processes jobs')
sendPrompt('How many workers should a Go worker pool have? Best practices for pool sizing')
sendPrompt('How does a Go worker goroutine exit cleanly when the job channel is closed?')
sendPrompt('What is a shared resource in Go concurrency? Give an example like a map or counter accessed by multiple goroutines')
sendPrompt('Explain sync.Mutex and sync.RWMutex in Go. Show Lock/Unlock and defer patterns with code')
sendPrompt('How does sync.WaitGroup work in Go? Explain Add, Done, and Wait with a fan-out/fan-in example')
sendPrompt('How do I check ctx.Done() in Go to cancel goroutines when a context expires?')
